textByHashes.446b97e982904c2b48c0b9eca5cd03bc1a2cb3c5: Oh! That was fast! He only set off recently, and I was wondering how he was doing. So, where is this gift?
textByHashes.9de2b99840b6bfab991e3fc9bb2a100d8b451198: Wait! Here, take this. I was going to have it for my lunch, but I suppose you can have it in payment.
textByHashes.4d0835dde77f534ace558f3ca2e76d73fd6ccd4d: Hello again! Does my father send any word...or treasures like before?
textByHashes.6eef58adfff431fa42363281959f9a97c0242b86: Sorry, outlander, but I have things to be doing.
